questions.prompt_task_text: What did the captain tell you after the escape-room run?
questions.answer: He didn't say, so I'll find out tomorrow.

questions.prompt: Why did the juggling club move out of your old gym?
questions.prompt_task_text: Why did the juggling club move out of your old gym?
questions.answer: Because the room we used lost its overhead lighting.

questions.prompt: Why did they postpone the escape-room fundraiser again this term?
questions.prompt_task_text: Why did they postpone the escape-room fundraiser again this term?
questions.answer: Apparently the student volunteers who built the puzzles needed another full week.

questions.prompt: Is the campus observatory open for volunteers tonight?
questions.prompt_task_text: Is the campus observatory open for volunteers tonight?
questions.answer: Yeah, they're short, so I'll help tonight.

questions.prompt: Did you sign up for the midnight breakfast event?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you sign up for the midnight breakfast event?
questions.answer: Sorry, the deadline slipped past me yesterday.

questions.prompt: What did the organizer tell you about the succulent sale?
questions.prompt_task_text: What did the organizer tell you about the succulent sale?
questions.answer: She told me the pots that arrived sold quickly.

questions.prompt: Do you know whether the board-game cafe takes reservations?
questions.prompt_task_text: Do you know whether the board-game cafe takes reservations?
questions.answer: Honestly I'm not sure they hold weekend tables.

questions.prompt: The tutoring sessions for veterans were rescheduled again.
questions.prompt_task_text: The tutoring sessions for veterans were rescheduled again.
questions.answer: Do you know whether our usual room still works?

questions.prompt: The photography darkroom looks completely different now.
questions.prompt_task_text: The photography darkroom looks completely different now.
questions.answer: Did you hear it was repainted over the weekend?

questions.prompt: Could you find out when the planetarium projector gets fixed?
questions.prompt_task_text: Could you find out when the planetarium projector gets fixed?
questions.answer: Sure, let me find out whether they shipped it.

questions.prompt: Why did the salsa instructor switch the lessons to Thursday evenings?
questions.prompt_task_text: Why did the salsa instructor switch the lessons to Thursday evenings?
questions.answer: Because the studio that we booked freed up only on Thursday evenings.

questions.prompt: Why did the bakery move its grand opening up a week?
questions.prompt_task_text: Why did the bakery move its grand opening up a week?
questions.answer: Because the new ovens that they ordered arrived far sooner than expected.

questions.prompt: Did you get your bowls into the kiln?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you get your bowls into the kiln?
questions.answer: No, you can't load yours until tonight.

questions.prompt: Has anyone checked the rooftop hives lately?
questions.prompt_task_text: Has anyone checked the rooftop hives lately?
questions.answer: Apparently the beekeeper who tends our hives comes Friday.

questions.prompt: Did you ever sign up for a fridge rental?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you ever sign up for a fridge rental?
questions.answer: Yeah, they gave me one that fits under my desk.

questions.prompt: When does the chess simul start tonight?
questions.prompt_task_text: When does the chess simul start tonight?
questions.answer: It starts right after the dinner rush.

questions.prompt: I'm hoping to grab something at the thrift pop-up today.
questions.prompt_task_text: I'm hoping to grab something at the thrift pop-up today.
questions.answer: Do you know if the thrift pop-up takes my card?

questions.prompt: Where do you renew your bus pass these days?
questions.prompt_task_text: Where do you renew your bus pass these days?
questions.answer: Honestly it's quicker if you hit the kiosk downstairs.

questions.prompt: Did you hear the comedy open mic changed locations?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you hear the comedy open mic changed locations?
questions.answer: Yeah, they moved our open mic to the back lounge.

questions.prompt: What did the climbing staff tell you about the belay test?
questions.prompt_task_text: What did the climbing staff tell you about the belay test?
questions.answer: The desk worker told me to go find out the schedule myself.

questions.prompt: Is the community fridge stocked this morning?
questions.prompt_task_text: Is the community fridge stocked this morning?
questions.answer: Volunteers refilled our shelves an hour ago.

questions.prompt: Your herb spiral looks a little dry today.
questions.prompt_task_text: Your herb spiral looks a little dry today.
questions.answer: Do you know if we should water it tonight?

questions.prompt: Your drone club posted a new meeting time.
questions.prompt_task_text: Your drone club posted a new meeting time.
questions.answer: Do you know if our slot was moved to Thursdays?

questions.prompt: Do you need anything before the archery range?
questions.prompt_task_text: Do you need anything before the archery range?
questions.answer: You sign a waiver at the desk.

questions.prompt: Has the zine library reopened yet?
questions.prompt_task_text: Has the zine library reopened yet?
questions.answer: I was wondering when it reopens after break.

questions.prompt: Have you seen the campus cat around today?
questions.prompt_task_text: Have you seen the campus cat around today?
questions.answer: No, someone said it was taken to the vet.

questions.prompt: Did you make it to the silent disco?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you make it to the silent disco?
questions.answer: No, they'd moved our disco to the gym already.

questions.prompt: Did you get your laptop working again?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you get your laptop working again?
questions.answer: I'm not sure whether the fix-it clinic accepts laptops that won't start.

questions.prompt: Have you finished your mural yet?
questions.prompt_task_text: Have you finished your mural yet?
questions.answer: The mural we started last week looks almost done.

questions.prompt: Why do those stargazing talks fill up fast?
questions.prompt_task_text: Why do those stargazing talks fill up fast?
questions.answer: The room only seats about twenty people.

questions.prompt: The kombucha workshop filled up so quickly.
questions.prompt_task_text: The kombucha workshop filled up so quickly.
questions.answer: Do you know whether they saved me a spot?
